nasb.text: May the Lord grant that you may find rest, each in the house of her husband.” Then she kissed them, and they lifted up their voices and wept.

esv.text: The Lord grant that you may find rest, each of you in the house of her husband!” Then she kissed them, and they lifted up their voices and wept.

cnv.text: 願耶和華使你們各人有機會再嫁，找到歸宿。”跟著親吻她們，她們就發聲大哭，

ccb.text: 愿耶和华使你们都有机会再嫁，找到好归宿。”拿俄米说完了，就亲吻她们。她们都放声大哭，

csbs.text: 愿耶和华赐福你们在各自新的丈夫家中找到安宁。”然后娜娥米亲吻了她们；她们就放声大哭，
